docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT HASZ, KARL MAILED TO RESPONDENT DINTCHO, STANLEY
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2011 BY JPT ELLIOTT MYLES. (414).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF 08-10-11, JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. PARTIES PRESENT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD AND ARGUED, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DINTCHO, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASZ, KARL $4,947.83 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,032.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 414
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY HASZ, KARL DINTCHO, STANLEY
ORDER RE: MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT DINTCHO, STANLEY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HASZ, KARL $1,096.60 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,181.60, PRINCIPAL REPRESENTS: WATER OF $423.85 (1/2 OF 1/4); PG&E FOR JULY TO OCT. 10 (JUNE' 10 BEING LAST SEPARATE UTILITIES PAYMENT OF $760 (1/2); REPAIRS OF $2,374.25; SET OFF OF $2,462.50 SECURITY DEPOSIT PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT HASZ, KARL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DINTCHO, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HASZ, KARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-05-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 414
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DINTCHO, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HASZ, KARL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-11-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HASZ, KARL
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,831.32 RE 34644 FOR TRANSACTION W0617403D004 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO STANLEY DINTCHO, DOC #1908325250, WARRANT #38204869, DATED MAY-23-2017
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2011 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH APPELLANT AND RESPONDENT, JPT ELLIOTT A. MYLES, CLERK A. PASCAL, NOT REPORTED. (414). EXHIBITS RETAINED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:23am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Karl Hasz present in pro per. Respondent, Stanley Dintcho present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

EXRA: lease, PGE bills, calculations, sample of tenant bill; collectively marked.
EXA1: payments/bank reciepts, photos, notice of violation, history collectively marked

10:57am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Judgment Entered
